# George Popescu Projects

> Photography, ventures, and investments from a multi-exit founder.

George Popescu Projects showcases the work of a fashion and editorial photographer, serial entrepreneur, and investor. His projects span media, fintech, blockchain, real estate, and more.

## Pages

- [Home](https://georgepopescuprojects.com/): Overview of projects and ventures
- [About George Popescu](https://georgepopescuprojects.com/about.html): Background and philosophy
- [Insights](https://georgepopescuprojects.com/insights.html): Articles and reflections
- [Contact](https://georgepopescuprojects.com/contact.html): Get in touch

## Key Articles

- [Paris Reflections](https://georgepopescuprojects.com/paris-reflections.html)
